# metes

> AI-powered listing marketing for high-performing solo real estate agents.

metes (https://www.metes.app) generates a complete, MLS-ready marketing campaign from listing photos and agent notes in about 30 seconds. Agents review the full package — copy, social posts, email sequence, ranked photos — before paying. No subscription. No account required.

## What metes produces per listing

- **MLS-ready listing description** — lifestyle-forward copy that sells the home, sized to MLS character limits and grounded in real photo analysis (not stock phrases)
- **Social launch pack** — Facebook and Instagram captions matched to specific listing photos with crop guidance and aspect-ratio recommendations
- **4-email campaign sequence** — Just Listed, Open House Invitation, Why This Home, Just Sold — pre-written, ready to send
- **Fair Housing compliance audit** — every asset reviewed before publishing, with revision notes and per-asset pass/flag status
- **Top 25 photos ranked by marketing impact** — AI-ranked, renamed with SEO-friendly filenames (e.g. `01_hero_front-exterior.jpg`), plus per-photo captions for MLS alt text and Zillow
- **Neighborhood insight** — a multi-section guide with a lifestyle paragraph sized for the MLS community field, plus categorized local picks (everyday essentials, parks, dining, fitness)
- **Optional photo editing** — professional color correction, sky enhancement, and perspective fix on every photo

## How it works

1. Agent uploads listing photos (up to 50) and pastes agent notes — any format, any structure
2. metes analyzes photos with computer vision to detect room types, features, and image quality
3. Agent reviews and edits the extracted property details (price, beds/baths, square footage, features)
4. metes generates the full marketing campaign in ~30 seconds
5. Agent previews the complete package in a Zillow-style preview before paying $35
6. After payment, the full ZIP and emailed download link are available for 7 days

## Pricing

- **Listing Copy Package** — $35 per listing
- **Listing Copy + Photo Editing** — $80 per listing
- No subscription. No account required. No card on file until after preview.

## Free tools

- **Fair Housing Compliance Checker** — https://www.metes.app/tools/fha-compliance-checker — paste any listing description for an instant Fair Housing audit with revised compliant copy
- **Neighborhood Guide Generator** — https://www.metes.app/tools/neighborhood-guide — enter any U.S. address to generate a free neighborhood guide for use in listings and buyer presentations

## Why agents choose metes

- **Try before you pay** — full marketing package is generated and previewed before payment
- **No subscription trap** — pay per listing, only when you actually have a listing
- **Built-in Fair Housing review** — every asset audited automatically, not a separate paid service
- **Real photo analysis** — copy is grounded in what's actually in the listing photos, not generic templates
- **No software to learn** — paste notes, upload photos, download ZIP

## Target user

High-performing solo real estate agents in the United States who list residential properties and want to move faster without sacrificing marketing quality. Designed for the agent who closes 12+ listings a year and treats marketing as part of the service, not an afterthought.

## Company

metes is an independent micro-SaaS product built by a working product manager. Contact: help@metes.app
